config.agentmail.api_key_empty: Please enter an API key first.
config.agentmail.api_key_save_failed: Failed to save API key to vault.
config.agentmail.api_key_saved: AgentMail API key saved to vault.
config.agentmail.status_no_inbox: Relay needs a primary inbox ID
help.agentmail.api_key: AgentMail API key. Stored securely in the encrypted vault.
help.agentmail.auto_create_inbox: Allows setup flows to create the configured inbox automatically when supported.
help.agentmail.base_url: Base URL for the AgentMail REST API.
help.agentmail.display_name: Friendly name shown for newly created inboxes.
help.agentmail.domain: Optional AgentMail domain to use when creating an inbox.
help.agentmail.enabled: Enables the AgentMail API integration and exposes the namespaced agentmail tool.
help.agentmail.inbox_id: Primary inbox used by the relay service and as the default for tool operations.
help.agentmail.max_attachment_mb: Maximum size for attachments sent through AgentMail.
help.agentmail.poll_interval_seconds: Polling fallback interval. Values below 30 seconds are raised at runtime.
help.agentmail.readonly: Blocks sending, replying, forwarding, create, update, and delete operations.
help.agentmail.relay_to_agent: Wake the agent when new messages arrive in the primary inbox. Disabled automatically in egg mode.
help.agentmail.relay_cheatsheet_id: Optional cheatsheet whose content is appended as instructions to every relayed new-mail prompt.
help.agentmail.use_websocket: Prefer outbound WebSockets for new mail notifications; polling remains the fallback.
help.agentmail.username: Inbox username used when auto-creating or creating inboxes.
help.agentmail.websocket_url: WebSocket endpoint used for inbound message notifications.
